ad_intelligence.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ad_intelligence (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  lead_id integer,
  platform varchar(30) NOT NULL,
  advertiser_name varchar(255),
  advertiser_id varchar(255),
  ad_creative_text text,
  ad_creative_url varchar(500),
  ad_format varchar(50),
  date_started date,
  date_ended date,
  countries text[],
  estimated_spend_range varchar(50),
  raw_data jsonb,
  fetched_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  fingerprint_hash text,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

ad_observations.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ad_observations (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  platform text NOT NULL,
  advertiser_name text,
  advertiser_id text,
  advertiser_domain text,
  ad_text text,
  ad_creative_url text,
  landing_url text,
  landing_domain text,
  country text,
  started_at timestamptz,
  ended_at timestamptz,
  observed_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  fingerprint_hash text NOT NULL,
  confidence numeric DEFAULT 0.8,
  raw_payload jsonb,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

ad_scraping_runs.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ad_scraping_runs (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  started_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  ended_at timestamptz,
  platform text NOT NULL,
  query text,
  country text,
  records_found integer DEFAULT 0,
  records_new integer DEFAULT 0,
  status text DEFAULT 'running'::text,
  error text,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

alias_health.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS alias_health (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  workspace_id integer DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  alias_id integer NOT NULL,
  alias_email varchar(120) NOT NULL,
  checked_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  warmup_day integer DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  sends_7d integer DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  bounces_7d integer DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  complaints_7d integer DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  opens_7d integer DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  bounce_rate_7d numeric(5,4) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  complaint_rate_7d numeric(5,4) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  open_rate_7d numeric(5,4) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  mail_tester_score numeric(3,1),
  mail_tester_at timestamptz,
  health_score integer DEFAULT 100 NOT NULL,
  status varchar(20) DEFAULT 'active'::character varying NOT NULL,
  status_changed_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  notes text,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

aliases.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS aliases (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  email varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  domain varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  persona_name varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  first_name varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  user_owner varchar(32),
  warmup_day integer DEFAULT 0,
  day_quota integer DEFAULT 2,
  status varchar(16) DEFAULT 'active'::character varying,
  created_at timestamp DEFAULT now(),
  relay varchar(50) DEFAULT 'resend'::character varying,
  last_used_at timestamp,
  bounce_count_7d integer DEFAULT 0,
  warmup_phase varchar(50) DEFAULT 'cold'::character varying,
  sent_today integer DEFAULT 0,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

aman_actions.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS aman_actions (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  action_type varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  context jsonb NOT NULL,
  performed_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  source varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  outcome varchar(30),
  status varchar(20) DEFAULT 'open'::character varying,
  priority varchar(10) DEFAULT 'normal'::character varying,
  lead_id integer,
  resolved_at timestamptz,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

api_key_rotations.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS api_key_rotations (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  service varchar(60) NOT NULL,
  rotated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  grace_until timestamptz,
  old_key_fingerprint varchar(64),
  new_key_fingerprint varchar(64),
  rotated_by varchar(60) DEFAULT 'system'::character varying,
  method varchar(30) DEFAULT 'manual'::character varying,
  status varchar(30) DEFAULT 'rotated'::character varying,
  notes text,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

audit_events.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_events (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  workspace_id integer DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  audit_page_id bigint NOT NULL,
  hash varchar(16) NOT NULL,
  event_type varchar(40) NOT NULL,
  section_id varchar(40),
  dwell_ms integer,
  scroll_pct integer,
  user_agent varchar(500),
  ip_hash varchar(64),
  referer varchar(500),
  occurred_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

audit_pages.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_pages (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  workspace_id integer DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  lead_id integer,
  slug varchar(120) NOT NULL,
  hash varchar(16) NOT NULL,
  domain varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  sector varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  country varchar(8) DEFAULT 'UK'::character varying NOT NULL,
  framework_version varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  payload_json jsonb NOT NULL,
  generated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  expires_at timestamptz DEFAULT (now() + '180 days'::interval) NOT NULL,
  status varchar(20) DEFAULT 'live'::character varying NOT NULL,
  archived_at timestamptz,
  pdf_url varchar(500),
  share_card_url varchar(500),
  open_count integer DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  last_opened_at timestamptz,
  high_intent_at timestamptz,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

audit_trail_exports.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_trail_exports (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  scope varchar(40),
  lead_id integer,
  period_start date,
  period_end date,
  reason varchar(60),
  export_file text,
  row_count integer,
  signature varchar(128),
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

bounce_events.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bounce_events (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  workspace_id integer DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  lead_id integer,
  recipient_email varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  relay varchar(40),
  bounce_type varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  smtp_code varchar(10),
  reason text,
  payload jsonb,
  received_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  alias_id integer,
  send_id bigint,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

cal_bookings.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cal_bookings (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  cal_event_id text,
  event_type text,
  lead_id integer,
  attendee_name text,
  attendee_email text,
  attendee_company text,
  start_at timestamptz,
  end_at timestamptz,
  status text DEFAULT 'confirmed'::text,
  pre_call_brief_url text,
  outcome text,
  next_step text,
  next_step_due date,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

case_studies.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS case_studies (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  client_account_id integer,
  client_id integer,
  slug varchar(160),
  title varchar(240),
  narrative text,
  metrics jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  status varchar(40) DEFAULT 'draft_pending_approval'::character varying,
  published_url text,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

channel_sends.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS channel_sends (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  lead_id integer NOT NULL,
  channel text NOT NULL,
  touch integer DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  message_text text,
  status text DEFAULT 'pending'::text NOT NULL,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  sent_at timestamptz,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

classifier_audit_log.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS classifier_audit_log (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  workspace_id integer DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  invocation_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  message_hash varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  classifier_version varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  llm_used varchar(40),
  llm_latency_ms integer,
  tokens_in integer,
  tokens_out integer,
  cost_usd_micro integer,
  output_category varchar(40),
  output_confidence numeric(4,3),
  fallback_chain varchar(120),
  cache_hit boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

client_accounts.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS client_accounts (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  lead_id integer,
  client_slug varchar(160),
  legal_name varchar(320),

  deal_value numeric(12,2),
  currency varchar(3) DEFAULT 'GBP'::character varying,
  contract_start date,
  contract_end date,
  status varchar(30) DEFAULT 'active'::character varying,

  account_manager varchar(120) DEFAULT 'Aman'::character varying,
  metadata jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

client_email_files.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS client_email_files (

  risk_factors jsonb DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,

)

cold_recipient_log.create:

  mailbox_address varchar(320) NOT NULL,

  sent_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),

)

compliance_checks.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS compliance_checks (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  lead_id integer,
  verdict varchar(20),
  reason text,
  applicable_laws jsonb,
  mandatory_elements_present boolean,
  missing_elements jsonb,
  checked_at timestamp DEFAULT now(),
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

compliance_docs.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS compliance_docs (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  doc_id text NOT NULL,
  jurisdiction text NOT NULL,
  sector text DEFAULT 'all'::text NOT NULL,
  regulator text NOT NULL,
  law_name text NOT NULL,
  law_ref text,
  regulator_url text,
  category text NOT NULL,
  applies_to_channel text DEFAULT 'all'::text,
  summary text NOT NULL,
  violation_pattern jsonb,
  severity text DEFAULT 'AMBER'::text,
  penalty_description text,
  enforcement_example text,
  enforcement_date date,
  enforcement_source_url text,
  email_hook text,
  mandatory_element text,
  last_verified timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  embedding vector,
  metadata jsonb,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

compliance_rules.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS compliance_rules (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  framework_short varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  rule_id varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  description text NOT NULL,
  regex_pattern text,
  url_check varchar(500),
  severity varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  citation_url varchar(500),
  enforcement_example text,
  exceptions text,
  active boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  rule_type varchar(30) DEFAULT 'must_appear'::character varying NOT NULL,
  trigger_pattern text,
  sector_relevance text[],
  fine_low_gbp integer,
  fine_high_gbp integer,
  layman_explanation text,
  tamazia_fix_short text,
  service_page_path text,
  pricing_tier text,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

dead_letter_queue.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dead_letter_queue (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  workspace_id integer DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  failure_type varchar(60) NOT NULL,
  payload jsonb NOT NULL,
  attempt_count integer DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  status varchar(20) DEFAULT 'open'::character varying NOT NULL,
  first_seen timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  last_seen timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  resolved_at timestamptz,
  notes text,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

decision_rollbacks.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS decision_rollbacks (

  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

disposable_domains.create:

)

)

  typo varchar(255) NOT NULL,

)

dr_drills.create:

  report_file text,

  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

email_archive_index.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_archive_index (

  send_id bigint,
  lead_id integer,

  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

email_sequence_state.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_sequence_state (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  workspace_id integer DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  lead_id integer NOT NULL,
  current_touch integer DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  last_touch_sent_at timestamptz,
  next_due_at timestamptz,
  status varchar(40) DEFAULT 'pending'::character varying NOT NULL,
  paused_reason text,
  manually_handled boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  state_history jsonb DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb NOT NULL,
  last_alias_id integer,
  last_message_id varchar(255),
  thread_root_message_id varchar(255),
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

forecasts.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS forecasts (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  snapshot_date date DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE NOT NULL,
  pipeline_value numeric(12,2),
  weighted_value numeric(12,2),
  best_case numeric(12,2),
  likely_case numeric(12,2),
  worst_case numeric(12,2),
  open_deals integer,
  stage_breakdown jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  quota numeric(12,2),
  gap_to_quota numeric(12,2),
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

framework_versions.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS framework_versions (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  framework_name varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  framework_short varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  jurisdiction varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  version varchar(20) DEFAULT '1.0.0'::character varying NOT NULL,
  rules_count integer DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  last_reviewed_at date DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE NOT NULL,
  reviewed_by varchar(200) DEFAULT 'Aman Pareek, International Business Lawyer'::character varying NOT NULL,
  status varchar(20) DEFAULT 'active'::character varying NOT NULL,
  notes text,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  sector_news text,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

generic_local_parts.create:

  local_part text NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (local_part)
)

health_check.create:

  spam_rate numeric(5,2),
  checked_at timestamp DEFAULT now(),
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

  mailbox varchar(120) NOT NULL,

  last_polled_at timestamptz,

  error text,
  notes text,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

inbound_emails.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS inbound_emails (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  workspace_id integer DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  received_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  mailbox varchar(120),
  imap_uid bigint,
  from_email varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  to_email varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  subject text,
  in_reply_to varchar(255),
  message_id varchar(255),
  thread_id varchar(255),
  body_plain text,
  body_html text,
  matched_lead_id integer,
  matched_send_id bigint,
  matched_alias_id integer,
  classification varchar(40),
  classification_confidence numeric(4,3),
  manual_reply_from_aman boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
  ooo_detected boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
  stop_keyword_detected boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
  bounce_detected boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
  spam_complaint boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
  draft_response text,
  draft_action varchar(60),
  slack_notification_sent_at timestamptz,
  aman_action varchar(40),
  aman_action_at timestamptz,
  reviewed boolean DEFAULT false,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

intel_items.create:

)

invoices.create:

  paid_at timestamptz,
  status varchar(30) DEFAULT 'draft'::character varying,
  payment_method varchar(50),
  invoice_url text,
  line_items jsonb DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

)

)

lead_sources.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lead_sources (

  description text,
  status text DEFAULT 'active'::text NOT NULL,

  rate_limit_per_day integer,
  has_api_key boolean DEFAULT false,

)

leads.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS leads (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  company varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  domain varchar(255),
  sector varchar(64),
  contact_first varchar(64),
  contact_last varchar(64),
  contact_title varchar(128),
  email varchar(255),
  phone varchar(64),
  city varchar(64),
  product_line varchar(128),
  programme varchar(128),
  research_dossier text,
  status varchar(32) DEFAULT 'new'::character varying,
  source varchar(64),
  imported_at timestamp DEFAULT now(),
  jurisdiction varchar(50),
  entity_type varchar(50),
  consent_documented boolean DEFAULT false,
  generic_address boolean DEFAULT false,
  enriched_at timestamp,
  email_source varchar(50),
  email_verified boolean DEFAULT false,
  email_confidence integer,
  dnc_reason text,
  bounce_count integer DEFAULT 0,
  first_name varchar(100),
  last_name varchar(100),
  title varchar(100),
  contact_email varchar(320),
  contact_confidence integer,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  replied boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
  last_reply_received_at timestamptz,
  next_touch_date date,
  personalisation_pointers jsonb,
  personalisation_quality_score numeric(4,3),
  personalisation_generated_at timestamptz,
  audit_url text,
  audit_url_minted_at timestamptz,
  audit_first_touch_sentence text,
  source_query text,
  source_payload_hash text,
  source_raw jsonb,
  dormant boolean DEFAULT false,
  linkedin_url text,
  linkedin_confidence numeric,
  instagram_handle text,
  instagram_confidence numeric,
  ad_intel jsonb,
  lead_audience text DEFAULT 'tamazia'::text,
  priority_score numeric DEFAULT 50,
  ad_intel_score numeric DEFAULT 0,
  lifecycle_stage text,
  acquisition_channel text,
  lead_type text,
  first_contacted_at timestamptz,
  last_activity_at timestamptz,
  website text,
  best_channel text,
  aggressive_selected boolean DEFAULT false,
  aggressive_source boolean DEFAULT false,
  scrape_stream text,
  verify_status text,
  scraped_at timestamptz,
  scrape_query text,
  all_emails jsonb,
  all_socials jsonb,
  quality_score integer,
  quality_fit boolean,
  quality_layers jsonb,
  quality_scored_at timestamptz,
  duplicate_of bigint,
  website_intel jsonb,
  people jsonb,
  domain_resolve_failed boolean DEFAULT false,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

lia_register.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lia_register (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  workspace_id integer DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  recorded_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL,
  lead_id integer,
  send_id bigint,
  purpose text NOT NULL,
  necessity text NOT NULL,
  balancing_test text NOT NULL,
  data_minimisation text NOT NULL,
  retention_period varchar(60) DEFAULT '180 days'::character varying NOT NULL,
  lia_signed_by varchar(120) DEFAULT 'Aman Pareek'::character varying NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

linkedin_outreach.create:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS linkedin_outreach (
  id bigint GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY NOT NULL,
  lead_id integer,

)
